name: Tangshan Sunfar Silicon Industries Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tangshan Sunfar Silicon Industries Co.,Ltd. produces and sells trichlorosilane, potassium hydroxide, potassium sulfate, and silicon tetrachloride products in China. It also exports its products to South Africa, India, Malaysia, Indonesia, Taiwan, South Korea, Australia, etc. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Tangshan, China.
